title: Cheapest bundle sort
prompt:
task_id=T1
You must sort three items by their per-unit shipping cost in ascending order.

Items to sort: pen, notebook, monitor.

Shipping rates are available through the `rate_lookup(item)` tool; you can also verify ordering with `compare(a, b)`.

Return the sorted list as a JSON array of strings, e.g. ["a","b","c"] with no spaces between elements, via `answer(content=...)`.

Available tools: answer, recall_knowledge, rate_lookup, compare.

Call recall_knowledge(task_id="T1") ONCE at the start to retrieve any procedures you learned on previous runs, then pick the most efficient approach. When you commit your final answer, pass ONLY the JSON array as `content`, no extra prose.
